scope: Move upstream utilities and shared constants out of runtime/src/agenc/upstream.
constantsPlacementRationale: The checklist says constants should be inlined into the consuming subsystem. In this migration, most constants have multiple consumers spanning upstream mirror code, TUI code, runtime adapters, and root utilities. Duplicating those constants into every consumer would increase divergence during the remaining purge. runtime/src/constants is therefore the AgenC-owned consuming subsystem for shared constants until later subsystem-specific cleanup can inline single-owner constants safely.
gates: runtime/src/agenc/upstream/utils and runtime/src/agenc/upstream/constants contain zero source files
runtime/src has zero importers of agenc/upstream/utils or agenc/upstream/constants
moved utils/constants have no undocumented ts-nocheck sweep; only explicitly marked boundary files may keep ts-nocheck while they import not-yet-absorbed upstream subsystems
upstream mirror, TUI, and memdir files newly pulled into the typecheck graph by moved purge roots may keep only documented temporary ts-nocheck boundaries until their owning subsystems are absorbed
moved utils/constants reject known donor repository, package, and non-agenc.tech AgenC-owned domains
